name: loading-section
description: A centred loading placeholder for a whole region: a spinner with an optional caption, framed in a token-styled box that reserves height so content does not jump. The Filament loading-section equivalent. Composes the spinner primitive; plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the loading-section partial to your JTE root at lievit/loading-section.jte, reached as @template.lievit.loading-section(label=..., bordered=..., caption=...). It composes @template.lievit.spinner, so `lievit add loading-section` pulls the spinner too. Swap it for the real content once loaded (htmx target / wire morph). The source is yours: edit freely.
